{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Starhammer's abilities
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] possesses impossible speed, strength, invulnerability, and interstellar flight.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Most of his powers are famous—impossible speed, strength, invulnerability, interstellar flight, and so on, but there’s one most people aren’t aware of.”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
